ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic data (e.g., OK, ERROR) */,
  "avg_measured_time" INTEGER /* Average measured time of traffic */,
  "avg_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of traffic */,
  "ext_id" INTEGER /* External ID of the sensor or camera */,
  "median_measured_time" INTEGER /* Median measured time of traffic */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles detected */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the traffic data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the data was collected */,
  "hour_of_day" TEXT /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "incident_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if there was a traffic incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES traffic_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES traffic_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_ext_id FOREIGN KEY ("ext_id") REFERENCES traffic_sensors ("ext_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic sensor or camera */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor or camera (e.g., inductive loop, camera) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor or camera */,
  "ext_id" INTEGER /* External ID of the sensor or camera */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor or camera */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor or camera */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor or camera */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL where the report can be accessed */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "data_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data used in the report */,
  "data_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
